articles.author: Lee Ying Shan
articles.title: South Korea stocks fall 5% as tech heavyweights follow plunge in Wall Street's AI-linked names - CNBC
articles.description: Asia-Pacific markets fell on Friday as investors assessed a rotation out of chip stocks on Wall Street that lifted the Dow Jones Industrial Average to a record close.
articles.content:
South Korea stocks plunged Friday, leading losses in the region, as the slump in Wall Street tech names overnight spread into Asia, dragging benchmark indexes lower.
The Kospi was last down 5.01%, w… [+1757 chars]

articles.title: Filtr is a new privacy tool that blocks ads in almost every iPhone and Mac app - TechCrunch
articles.description: This popular ad blocker app for iPhones, iPads, and Macs can now block ads from loading inside apps, including web browsers, thanks to a new feature in the latest Apple software.
articles.content: Using an ad blocker is good for your security, privacy, and even the FBI recommends them to defend from online harms. But as much as ad blockers are great for cleaning up your browsing experience, th… [+4692 chars]
